cl_spec_progress.highlight: Matt from Lodestar interested in joining; targeting next call in two weeks
Lucid PM repo created (jflo/lucid-pm) to track missing CL specs, PRs, and implementation gaps
Boma to draft CL spec skeleton: SSZ containers, inclusion list, payload bid extension, LucidKey votes — standalone pieces only, pending EL decryption flow stabilization
Erigon (Mark) willing to review CL spec drafts and attempt implementation given Erigon 3 runs both EL and CL

kurtosis_devenv.highlight: Kurtosis sandwich-attack demo stack built against Fusaka; Glamsterdam/ePBS not yet stable enough to target

key_release_fee_design.highlight: Key publication fee mechanics unclear in spec: fee reduces gas headroom but is not itself a gas fee; needs cleaner separation and documentation
Consensus: treat key release fee as a separate object from gas; wallets responsible for accounting, may require new RPC for estimation
Key release fee is orthogonal to bundling; factoring out bundles to a separate EIP won't simplify key publication fee handling

optionality_and_lucid_design.highlight: Probabilistic front-running via self-key withholding is unsolvable without threshold encryption; top-of-block fees and bundling are the only current mitigations
Builder optionality (via FOCIL-style PTC vote wiggle room) is partially addressable: penalizing equivocating PTC votes would reduce exploitability
Whether optionality is a deal-breaker for Lucid CFI is a question that must go to ACD
Lucid cannot be upgraded to threshold encryption if/when it matures — a new scheme would be required from scratch

threshold_encryption_readiness.highlight: No threshold encryption scheme currently meets Ethereum's requirements: post-quantum security, low setup cost, scalable committee size, bulk decryption support
Ethereum Foundation cryptography team monitoring threshold encryption research; Benedict's requirements list exists and will be shared

action_items.action: Explore up to $10K ShutterDAO0X36 bounty for CL spec work; need help defining success criteria
Rewrite key publication fee section of EIP-8184 for clarity; coordinate with Anders
Discuss builder optionality and PTC equivocation penalties with Potuz
Share Benedict's Ethereum threshold encryption requirements list in Telegram

decisions.decision: Key release fee to be treated as separate from gas in the spec; wallet-layer responsibility for fee accounting
Probabilistic front-running optionality accepted as out-of-scope for Lucid; no protocol-level fix possible without threshold encryption
Optionality deal-breaker question to be escalated to ACD for CFI determination
